'''ngang챦fn챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiggler|jiggler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiggler|jiggler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngang챦fn챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fth|ngang챦fn챦fth]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fj|ngang챦fn챦fj]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fsh|ngang챦fn챦fsh]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f|ngang챦fn챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:ngang챦fng챦fn챦fth|ngang챦fng챦fn챦fth]] || [[word:ngang챦fng챦fn챦fj|ngang챦fng챦fn챦fj]] || [[word:ngang챦fng챦fn챦fsh|ngang챦fng챦fn챦fsh]] || [[word:ngang챦fng챦fn챦f|ngang챦fng챦fn챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fth|ngang챦fn챦fth]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fj|ngang챦fn챦fj]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦fsh|ngang챦fn챦fsh]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f|ngang챦fn챦f]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f|ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f|ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f|ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f|ngang챦fn챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦fn|ngang챦fn챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦fn|ngang챦fn챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦fn|ngang챦fn챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngang챦fn챦f챦fn|ngang챦fn챦f챦fn]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
